What We Do

Full-Service Painting & Cabinetry

From a single accent wall to a whole-house cabinet transformation, our crews bring the same care to every job.

Interior Painting

Walls, ceilings & trim finished clean and even, room by room.

Cabinet Painting

A like-new, factory-smooth finish — for a fraction of replacement cost.

Cabinet Refacing

New doors, drawer fronts & hardware without tearing out your layout.

Accent Walls

A single wall, done boldly, to anchor a whole room.

Specialty & Faux Finishes

Custom textures and treatments for a look you won't find in a can.

Why Homeowners Call Us

Painting Cabinets Beats Replacing Them

A full cabinet replacement can take weeks and cost thousands more. Here's what our customers get instead.

01

Save Time & Money

A fraction of the cost of new cabinetry, finished in days, not weeks.

02

Like-New Finish

Sprayed, factory-smooth coats that hold up to real daily use.

03

Less Mess & Disruption

Your kitchen stays a kitchen — we work clean and keep you in the loop.

04

A Custom Look You'll Love

Any color, any sheen — built around how you actually live in the space.

Our Mission

Quality Workmanship. Real Satisfaction.

At Paint Pros of Fort Worth, we're dedicated to providing exceptional painting services that enhance the beauty and value of your home. Our mission is to deliver quality workmanship and customer satisfaction with every project we undertake.

We'd love to come out and give you a free consultation and estimate. Call today and book your consultation.
